So "Küsten und Küstengewässer" fits. It's a coastal fjord (inner sea). Might also count "Boden" because focusing on bottom substrate. But main is "Küsten und Küstengewässer". We'll pick that.

The paper discusses fish species and benthic invertebrates. The taxa: e.g., Mytilus edulis (blue mussel) - belongs to "Andere Wirbellose"? Wait mussels are molluscs - class Bivalvia. Not in list. They don't list molluscs in allowed species_group: Options: Amphibien und Reptilien; Andere; Andere Pflanzen; Andere Wirbellose; Archaeen; Bakterien; Fische; Flechten; Gefäßpflanzen; Insekten; Moose; Pilze; Protisten; Protozoen; Säugetiere; Vögel. Mussels fall under "Andere Wirbellose". Yes.
